task0.objective: Fetch images from the BigEarthNet dataset and filter the images specifically from Switzerland.

task1.objective: Run the ResNet-32 classifier on the fetched BigEarthNet images to identify the 'Vineyards' LCC class.

task2.objective: Run the ResNet-32 classifier on the fetched BigEarthNet images to identify the 'Fruit trees and berry plantations' LCC class.

task3.objective: Plot the results of 'Vineyards' and 'Fruit trees and berry plantations' on a map.
